mapper.insert: insert into ServiceArea (Idx, SAName, SADirection, WayNum, CompactParking, LargeParking, DisabledParking, Address, Lat, Lng, Tel, ShopCode) values (#{Idx}, #{SAName}, #{SADirection}, #{WayNum}, #{CompactParking}, #{LargeParking}, #{DisabledParking}, #{Address}, #{Lat}, #{Lng}, #{Tel}, #{ShopCode})
mapper.select: Select * from ServiceArea where SAName Like concat ('%', #{name}, '%');

WITH frequency AS ( SELECT SAKey, SAName, SADirection, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM BookMark b inner join ServiceArea s on b.SAKey = s.Idx GROUP BY b.SAKey, s.SAName, s.SADirection ),
ranked AS ( SELECT SAName, cnt, SADirection , DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rnk FROM frequency )
SELECT SAName, cnt, SADirection FROM ranked WHERE rnk <= 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC, SAName, SADirection
select * from ServiceArea sa inner join BookMark bm on sa.Idx=bm.SAKey where bm.UserKey =#{n}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BookMark WHERE UserKey = #{Useridx} AND SAKey = #{SAidx}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, g.SAKey, g.Gasoline, g.Disel, g.LPG FROM ServiceArea s LEFT JOIN Gas g ON s.Idx = g.SAKey WHERE s.SAName = #{saname} AND s.SADirection LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sadirection}, '%') LIMIT 1
SELECT s.*, g.SAKey, g.Gasoline, g.Disel, g.LPG FROM ServiceArea s LEFT JOIN Gas g ON s.Idx = g.SAKey WHERE s.SAName = #{saname} LIMIT 1
SELECT s.*, g.SAKey, g.Gasoline, g.Disel, g.LPG FROM ServiceArea s LEFT JOIN Gas g ON s.Idx = g.SAKey WHERE s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY LENGTH(s.SAName) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.*, g.SAKey, g.Gasoline, g.Disel, g.LPG FROM ServiceArea s LEFT JOIN Gas g ON s.Idx = g.SAKey WHERE s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.SAName LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, LENGTH(s.SAName) ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT s.*, g.SAKey, g.Gasoline, g.Disel, g.LPG FROM ServiceArea s LEFT JOIN Gas g ON s.Idx = g.SAKey ORDER BY s.SAName
